reasoning.description: Step-by-step reasoning explaining how you designed this circuit, including signal flow, timing considerations, and block choices.

blocks.description: List of blocks to place. Each block has x, y, z coordinates (relative to origin), and a minecraft block state string.

x.description: X coordinate relative to build origin

y.description: Y coordinate relative to build origin

z.description: Z coordinate relative to build origin

state.description: Full Minecraft block state, e.g. 'minecraft:lever[facing=east,powered=false]' or 'minecraft:redstone_wire'

verification.description: Information needed to verify the circuit works correctly.

input_description.description: Description of the circuit input (e.g. 'lever at 0,0,0')

output_description.description: Description of expected output behavior (e.g. 'lamp at 2,0,0 turns on')
